description.p: A comprehensive open-source high performance processing package for GNU Octave based on Boost C++ Libraries. Provides direct access to Boost.Accumulators statistical accumulators for online computation of count, covariance, density, error of mean, extended P^2 quantiles, kurtosis, max/min, mean, median, moments, P^2 cumulative distribution, P^2 quantile, peaks over threshold, POT quantile, POT tail mean, skewness, sum, and tail statistics.
